LightningComponentBundle.description: B2B Commerce storefront invoice list with All/Open/Paid filter, summary cards, status badges, Pay/PDF actions, server-side sorting and pagination.

property.name: currencyCode
property.label: Currency code
property.description: ISO currency code used to format amounts.

property.name: detailPageApiName
property.label: Invoice details page API name
property.description: API name of the Experience Builder page (URL /invoice-details) that hosts the Capsa B2B Invoice Details component. The invoice number links here.
